hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "[PreCompact] Context is about to be compacted. BEFORE compacting, write session-notes.md in the project root (max 50 lines) covering: 1) current task & status, 2) architecture decisions made this session, 3) active bugs & steps to reproduce, 4) list of modified files, 5) next steps. This file survives compaction and will be read at next session start."}'
